name: deep-interview
description: A Codex skill that clarifies vague requests through a multilingual Socratic interview.

interface.longDescription: Deep Interview asks one focused question at a time to clarify goals, scope, constraints, and acceptance criteria before Codex starts implementation. User-facing output follows the user's language.
defaultPrompt: Use deep-interview to clarify this rough idea.
Interview me before planning this feature.
요구사항이 아직 흐릿해. 먼저 질문하면서 정리해줘.
